name: fourli-skills
description: Fourli's reusable skills package for agent-assisted development.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable Fourli skills for agent-assisted development
interface.longDescription: fourli-skills is a reusable skills package. Most skills are pure skills; Codex hooks are optional enhancements for skills that benefit from lifecycle support.
defaultPrompt: Use checkpoint to create a lightweight checkpoint.
Use checkpoint-maintenance to maintain an existing active checkpoint at handoff boundaries.
